hero.title: Open-platform
hero.subtitle: 涵盖 IAC、DevOps、安全、IAM 以及全局可观测性的平台解决方案。

showcases.title: 统一开放控制面
showcases.description: 集成 Gitea, Vault, Zitadel 等开源基础设施，为您提供一站式的企业级控制平面。

showcases.title: 安全交付生命周期
showcases.description: 从代码提交到生产部署，每一步都内置安全审计和策略合规，确保研发流程无懈可击。

showcases.title: 可信基础设施
showcases.description: 以基础设施即代码 (IaC) 的形式管理所有资源，实现版本化、可追溯和可复制的云原生底座。

hero.title: Open-platform
hero.subtitle: Platform solutions covering IAC, DevOps, Security, IAM, and global observability.

showcases.title: Unified Open Control Plane
showcases.description: Integrate open source infrastructure such as Gitea, Vault, Zitadel to provide a one-stop enterprise-level control plane.

showcases.title: Secure Delivery Lifecycle
showcases.description: From code commit to production deployment, every step has built-in security auditing and policy compliance, ensuring a flawless R&D process.

showcases.title: Trusted Infrastructure
showcases.description: Manage all resources as Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to achieve a versioned, traceable, and reproducible cloud-native foundation.
